children.heading: .—Amendments of Zoning Regulations and Maps
children.label: a .—Amendments of Zoning Regulations and Maps
children.text: The National Capital Planning Commission may make a report and recommendation to the Zoning Commission of the District of Columbia, as provided in (ch. 534, ), on the relation, conformity, or consistency of proposed amendments of the zoning regulations and maps with the comprehensive plan for the National Capital. The Planning Commission may also submit to the Zoning Commission proposed amendments or general revisions to the zoning regulations or the zoning map for the District of Columbia.section 5 of the Act of June 20, 193852 Stat. 798

children.heading: .—Additional Report by Planning Commission
children.label: b .—Additional Report by Planning Commission
children.text: When requested by an authorized representative of the Planning Commission, the Zoning Commission may recess for a reasonable period of time any public hearing it is holding to consider a proposed amendment to the zoning regulations or map so that the Planning Commission may have an opportunity to present to the Zoning Commission an additional report on the proposed amendment.

children.heading: Zoning Committee of National Capital Planning Commission.—
children.label: c Zoning Committee of National Capital Planning Commission.—

children.heading: .—Establishment and composition
children.label: 1 .—Establishment and composition
children.text: There is a Zoning Committee of the National Capital Planning Commission. The Committee consists of at least three members of the Planning Commission the Planning Commission designates for that purpose. The number of members serving on the Committee may vary.

children.label: A
children.text: to the extent the Planning Commission decides; and

children.label: B
children.text: when requested by the Zoning Commission and approved by the Planning Commission.
